name: Chicano Mural
description: LA/Southwest Chicano mural art — bold saturated colors, cultural pride, street art energy. Deep warm tones with vibrant red, gold, turquoise accents. Strong typography with condensed lettering.
source: Chicano street murals — LA barrio walls, Día de los Muertos iconography, lowrider culture, bold figurative art, sun/eagle/rose motifs

demo.title: Casa de Arte
demo.subtitle: Murales y Cultura — East Los Angeles

suggestions.icons: Bold line icons (stroke 2.5px) or hand-painted mural motifs — roses, eagles, suns, skulls
suggestions.components: thick borders, bold card frames, ribbon banners, painted-edge dividers, gradient overlays with warm-to-cool transitions, stacked uppercase labels
suggestions.avoid: thin delicate lines, pastel colors, minimalist whitespace-heavy layouts, corporate aesthetic, small lightweight fonts
suggestions.texture: gritty wall texture overlays, paint splatter accents, warm gradient backgrounds (deep red to gold), worn/distressed edge effects via box-shadow
